rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the use of 'non-abandonment proxy' as an outcome measure).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
